changelog: Add MTProto Proxy (Telegram) monitoring widget to dashboard
Modernize admin panel to Atmospheric Cyber-Elegance design
Full rebranding - remove VPN terminology, political terms, and owner PII from all files (~93 files)
InTunnel detection in stats_screen — use Clash API chains instead of hardcoded true
E2E Kill Switch verified (7/7) + add testing rules to RULES.md
Protected state + infinite reconnect + two-indicator UI
Apply firewall rules BEFORE engine.start, remove on error
